sent_simp: 这台设备只支持单相电源。
sent_trad: 這台設備只支持單相電源。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi zhǐ zhīchí dānxiàng diànyuán.
english: This device only supports single-phase power.

sent_simp: 她年轻时曾是一位知名女优。
sent_trad: 她年輕時曾是一位知名女優。
pinyin: Tā niánqīng shí céng shì yī wèi zhīmíng nǚyōu.
english: She was a well-known actress in her younger days.
